focus_point: Implementing a circular-reveal theme toggle in ArkUI ArkTS: snapshot the page root via @ohos.arkui.componentSnapshot.get into a PixelMap, show it in an overlay Image, flip isDarkMode + setColorMode underneath, then drive animateTo(~500ms) shrinking a Circle (centered at the touch point) used as .clip on the overlay so the new theme reveals from the touch point. Need exact import, get() signature/return/Promise, how to feed a PixelMap into Image, and whether .clip(Shape) re-evaluates correctly inside animateTo.
task_excerpt: Theme toggle (deep-color scenario 2) must play a circular reveal from the touch point. Plan: onTouch records window-relative (x,y) into @State touchX/touchY; toggleTheme snapshots root via componentSnapshot.get, flips isDarkMode + setColorMode, shows an overlay Image of the old snapshot, then animateTo({duration:500}) shrinks a Circle clip radius from maxCornerDistance to 0 anchored at touch point; on finish hide overlay.
project_evidence: Project imports from @kit.ArkUI (router) and @kit.AbilityKit (common). ArkUI primitives animateTo, .clip, Image, Circle, Shape are available in ArkUI. No existing componentSnapshot usage in the project. Theme button is a CorneredFlatIconButton in the top bar; root is the outer Column in Index.build().
platform_surfaces: ArkUI animateTo({duration, curve, onFinish}, () => state change)
ArkUI universal attribute .clip(Shape) and Circle({center:[x,y], radius})
ArkUI Image(src: PixelMap | ResourceStr) and @State driving overlay visibility
extra_constraints: Give the exact module import for componentSnapshot and the get() call shape (sync callback vs Promise<PixelMap>) and any required component id/getId.
Confirm whether Image accepts a PixelMap directly as src, and how to hold it in a @State field for re-render.

Confirm whether mutating a Circle radius held in @State inside the animateTo closure actually animates the .clip on the overlay Image (re-evaluates per frame), or whether a different attribute must be animated.
Flag lifecycle/threading constraints: must snapshot be taken before or after setColorMode; is the snapshot async; any delay needed.
Flag forbidden/invalid local usage (e.g., animating non-animatable attributes, clip not re-evaluating).
